message:
fix(sharding): forward Cx through ShardedWeztermClient impl (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Completes the Cx-forward fixes for all `WeztermInterface`
implementations, following the tick 30/31 pattern for Arc<dyn> and
UnifiedClient. ShardedWeztermClient routes through per-shard
backends, each of which is itself a WeztermHandle — this commit
threads caller cx through the shard routing to reach the concrete
backend's Cx-first path.

Scope:

1. crates/frankenterm-core/src/sharding.rs (+128 src)

   Eight new explicit `_with_cx` overrides on
   `impl WeztermInterface for ShardedWeztermClient` covering the
   Cx-first methods landed in ticks 27-29:

     * list_panes_with_cx (delegates to list_all_panes_with_cx
       from tick 26 — already cx-aware for pane_routes RwLock)
     * get_pane_with_cx (routes shard, calls
       backend.handle.get_pane_with_cx)
     * get_text_with_cx
     * send_text_with_cx
     * send_text_no_paste_with_cx
     * send_text_with_options_with_cx
     * send_control_with_cx
     * pane_tiered_scrollback_summary_with_cx

   Each routing method:

     1. Resolves the shard via `route_for_global_pane_id(pane_id)`
        (still ambient Cx — follow-up: thread cx through here too
        via `route_for_global_pane_id_with_cx`)
     2. Looks up the backend via `backend_for_id(shard_id)` (sync)
     3. Calls `backend.handle.METHOD_with_cx(cx, ...)` — which
        dispatches through WeztermHandle (tick 30 forward) →
        WeztermClient (tick 19-22 concrete) → MuxPool (pre-existing)
        → DirectMuxClient (pre-existing)

   send_ctrl_c_with_cx / send_ctrl_d_with_cx / get_pane_direction_with_cx
   not included here — ShardedWeztermClient's legacy impls delegate
   to self.send_control/.get_pane_direction via the trait default
   dispatch, which now correctly routes through the Cx-first chain
   via the send_control_with_cx override above plus the trait-default
   delegation.

Impact: the full delegation chain is now Cx-first end-to-end for
every `WeztermInterface` impl:

  Caller (workflows / robot / MCP / sharding / native_events)
    → UnifiedClient::METHOD_with_cx (tick 31 forward)
    → inner Arc<dyn WeztermInterface>::METHOD_with_cx (tick 30 forward)
    → either:
       - WeztermClient::METHOD_with_cx (tick 19-22 concrete)
          → MuxPool::METHOD_with_cx (pre-existing)
          → DirectMuxClient::METHOD_with_cx (pre-existing)
       - OR ShardedWeztermClient::METHOD_with_cx (this commit)
          → per-shard backend.handle.METHOD_with_cx (recursive,
            resolves to WeztermClient path via Arc forward)

Verification (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-rusticmaple-target):

  * cargo test -p frankenterm-core --lib sharding::: 95/95 pass
  * cargo test -p frankenterm-core --lib wezterm::: 160/160 pass
  * cargo clippy -p frankenterm-core --lib -D warnings: clean
  * rustfmt --check: clean

Leaves ft-xbnl0.2.3 still in_progress. The WeztermInterface
trait-object delegation graph is now Cx-first end-to-end in all
four impl paths (WeztermClient concrete, Arc<dyn> forward,
UnifiedClient forward, ShardedWeztermClient routing).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
